name: 🎶 | Miguel O’Hara
description:
Inspired by “Dead Girl Walking” from Heathers the Musical. A req from TikTok, thank you for your patience!!

ANYPOV: Per the decree of the most popular girl in school, USER's life is in social shambles. Rather than lie down and let it happen, they're going out on their own terms, with the help of Miguel. ***High School setting, all characters are 18+. TWs for all the normal stuff plus possible dubcon, somnophilia, underage drinking.*** 

dms are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia. check out my [18+ discord server!](https://discord.gg/JCGCSCJw4w)

art cred @kuv8sh5 on twitter.
creator: Elluxia
